title: Piquant Grilled Algerian Snow Peas Skewers
description: A spicy and gooey Algerian dish featuring snow peas, perfect for a lazy Sunday, made using a raclette grill and ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, harissa, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the snow peas to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated snow peas onto skewers, leaving a small space between each pea.
Place the skewers on the raclette grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the snow peas are tender.
While the snow peas are cooking, crumble the feta cheese into a small bowl.
Once the snow peas are cooked, place them on a serving plate and top with the crumbled feta cheese.
